name: io.github.AddyCuber/ybe-check
title: Ybe Check
description: Ybe Check — production-readiness security gatekeeper for vibe-coded apps. 16 scan modules, AI remediation, bento dashboard, and Copilot integration.

tools.name: ybe.scan_repo
tools.description: Scan a repository for security and production-readiness issues. Runs all enabled modules (secrets, prompt injection, PII, dependencies, auth guards, IaC, SBOM, etc.) and returns a unified JSON report with findings, scores, and a verdict.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the repository root.

modules.description: Optional subset of module names to run (e.g. ["secrets", "dependencies"]). Omit to run all.

categories.description: Optional subset of categories: static, dynamic, infra. Omit to run all.

tools.name: ybe.list_findings
tools.description: List findings from a previous or fresh scan, optionally filtered by severity or category. Loads ybe-report.json from the repo path when available; otherwise runs a new scan.

path.description: Path to the repository (or directory containing a ybe-report.json).

severity.description: Filter by severity: info, low, medium, high, critical.

category.description: Filter by category: static, dynamic, infra.

tools.name: ybe.get_remediation
tools.description: Get remediation guidance for a specific finding by ID. Returns the finding's ai_analysis block when present, or a minimal impact/remediation template otherwise.

tools.name: ybe.get_security_context
tools.description: Get a structured security summary of the workspace including score, verdict, severity counts, module health, and top fixes.

tools.name: ybe.enhance_prompt
tools.description: Wrap any user prompt with security-aware context from the scan report so LLM responses are security-informed.

prompt.description: The user's original prompt to enhance.

tools.name: ybe.get_fix_prompt
tools.description: Generate a ready-to-use fix prompt for a specific finding, including code context and severity info.

finding_id.description: The finding ID to generate a fix prompt for.

tools.name: ybe.get_review_prompt
tools.description: Generate a security-focused code review prompt for a specific file, including all findings related to that file.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file to review.

prompts.name: security-audit
prompts.description: Comprehensive security audit prompt — reviews the entire scan report and produces a structured analysis.

prompts.name: fix-critical
prompts.description: Fix all critical and high severity findings — generates step-by-step remediation plan.

prompts.name: review-file
prompts.description: Security-focused file review prompt — checks a specific file against all known findings.
